changeSet.author: cinex
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO users (username, email, password, full_name, phone, role, theater_id, enabled, email_verified, tier, storage_state) VALUES (N'admin', N'admin@cinex.vn', N'$2a$10$3KqUMOI7eM7WICDg0aH8I.AnzZpotYqJ.dnHEr3K6Xk8O4nGWRMBe', N'Quản trị tổng CineX', N'0900000000', N'SUPER_ADMIN', NULL, 1, 1, N'PLATINUM', N'ACTIVE');

changeSet.author: cinex
cinex
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO users (username, email, password, full_name, phone, date_of_birth, role, theater_id, enabled, email_verified, loyalty_points, lifetime_points, tier, storage_state) VALUES (N'user01', N'nguyen.an@example.com', N'$2a$10$3KqUMOI7eM7WICDg0aH8I.AnzZpotYqJ.dnHEr3K6Xk8O4nGWRMBe', N'Nguyễn Văn An', N'0911111111', '1995-03-15', N'USER', NULL, 1, 1, 450, 450, N'STANDARD', N'ACTIVE'), (N'user02', N'tran.binh@example.com', N'$2a$10$3KqUMOI7eM7WICDg0aH8I.AnzZpotYqJ.dnHEr3K6Xk8O4nGWRMBe', N'Trần Thị Bình', N'0922222222', '1998-07-22', N'USER', NULL, 1, 1, 1200, 1200, N'SILVER', N'ACTIVE'), (N'user03', N'le.cuong@example.com', N'$2a$10$3KqUMOI7eM7WICDg0aH8I.AnzZpotYqJ.dnHEr3K6Xk8O4nGWRMBe', N'Lê Quốc Cường', N'0933333333', '1990-11-08', N'USER', NULL, 1, 1, 2500, 2500, N'GOLD', N'ACTIVE'), (N'user04', N'pham.dung@example.com', N'$2a$10$3KqUMOI7eM7WICDg0aH8I.AnzZpotYqJ.dnHEr3K6Xk8O4nGWRMBe', N'Phạm Tiến Dũng', N'0944444444', '2002-05-30', N'USER', NULL, 1, 1, 80, 80, N'STANDARD', N'ACTIVE'), (N'user05', N'hoang.lan@example.com', N'$2a$10$3KqUMOI7eM7WICDg0aH8I.AnzZpotYqJ.dnHEr3K6Xk8O4nGWRMBe', N'Hoàng Thị Lan', N'0955555555', '1996-09-12', N'USER', NULL, 1, 1, 5500, 5500, N'PLATINUM', N'ACTIVE'), (N'user06', N'vu.minh@example.com', N'$2a$10$3KqUMOI7eM7WICDg0aH8I.AnzZpotYqJ.dnHEr3K6Xk8O4nGWRMBe', N'Vũ Hoàng Minh', N'0966666666', '1993-01-20', N'USER', NULL, 1, 0, 0, 0, N'STANDARD', N'ACTIVE'), (N'user07', N'do.huong@example.com', N'$2a$10$3KqUMOI7eM7WICDg0aH8I.AnzZpotYqJ.dnHEr3K6Xk8O4nGWRMBe', N'Đỗ Mỹ Hương', N'0977777777', '1999-04-10', N'USER', NULL, 1, 1, 750, 750, N'SILVER', N'ACTIVE'), (N'user08', N'bui.long@example.com', N'$2a$10$3KqUMOI7eM7WICDg0aH8I.AnzZpotYqJ.dnHEr3K6Xk8O4nGWRMBe', N'Bùi Văn Long', N'0988888888', '2005-12-25', N'USER', NULL, 1, 1, 0, 0, N'STANDARD', N'ACTIVE');
